calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-29-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue Kaplan; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Sara Lerschen. Petitioner Charles Patrick O'Malley appeared in pro per. Matter was continued to April 1, 2004 as the newspaper failed to provide the proof of service. At 10:15 AM, petitioner brings a fax copy of the proof of service and the court vacates the previous order. Petitioner is sworn and examined and the court grants the decree changing the name to John Patrick O.Malley. Decree signed in open court.
